sinks.expression: wp_die( __( "Hmmm, you're not supposed to be here.", 'host-webfonts-local' ) )
wp_die( __( "Hmmm, you're not supposed to be here.", 'host-webfonts-local' ) )
wp_die( __( "Hmmm, you're not supposed to be here.", 'host-webfonts-local' ) )
wp_die( __( "Hmmm, you're not supposed to be here.", 'host-webfonts-local' ) )
wp_die( __( "Hmmm, you're not supposed to be here.", 'host-webfonts-local' ) )

printf( __( 'Your fonts are causing layout shifts with a %2$s impact (CLS score: %1$s) on this page—and chances are, other pages are affected too. OMGF Pro\'s Magic Fallbacks fixes this automatically, on every page.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), esc_html( $cls ), strtolower( esc_html( $impact ) ), esc_url( home_url( $path ) ) )

printf( __( 'Downloaded stylesheets and font files %1$s are stored in: %2$s.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), is_multisite() ? __( '(for this site)', 'host-webfonts-local' ) : '', str_replace( ABSPATH, '', OMGF_UPLOAD_DIR ) )
wp_die( __( "You're not cool enough to access this page.", 'host-webfonts-local' ) )

sanitizers.expression: wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( '%s isn\'t detecting any Google Fonts on your homepage. This could be for several reasons. Click here to run a deeper investigation.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), apply_filters( 'omgf_settings_page_title', 'OMGF' ), esc_url( self::DAAN_DEV_DOCS_TROUBLESHOOTING_NO_FONTS_DETECTED ), OMGF::no_cache_optimize_url() ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'You can manually adjust global font settings in OMGF, or Upgrade to OMGF Pro and let Smart Optimize automatically optimize fonts per page.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), 'https://daan.dev/blog/how-to/wordpress-google-fonts/#3-2-preloading-font-files-above-the-fold', Settings::DAAN_WORDPRESS_OMGF_PRO ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Since you\'re using %s, Smart Optimize (Pro) loads only the right font subsets per language—instead of the currently configured %s subsets on every page.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), self::get_multilang_plugin(), $count_subsets ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( _n( 'This page is loading %2$s font face it doesn\'t need—and chances are, other pages are too. OMGF Pro\'s Smart Optimize removes them automatically, on every page.', 'This page is loading %2$s font faces it doesn\'t need—and chances are, other pages are too. OMGF Pro\'s Smart Optimize removes them automatically, on every page.', (int) $performance_checker_results['highest_unused_count'], 'host-webfonts-local' ), home_url( $performance_checker_results['highest_unused_path'] ), (int) $performance_checker_results['highest_unused_count'] ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Your fonts are slowing down your LCP by ~%sms on this page—and chances are, other pages are affected too. OMGF Pro\'s Smart Optimize removes them automatically, on every page.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), $performance_checker_results['highest_delay_ms'], home_url( $performance_checker_results['highest_delay_path'] ) ) )

esc_html(
									_n(
										'%s potential issue found in your configuration.',
										'%s potential issues found in your configuration.',
										count( $warnings ),
										'host-webfonts-local'
									)
								)

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Your theme (%1$s) requires additional configuration to be compatible with %2$s, check the list of known issues to fix it.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), ucfirst( $template_id ), apply_filters( 'omgf_settings_page_title', 'OMGF' ), Settings::DAAN_DOCS_OMGF_PRO_KNOWN_ISSUES ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'The plugin, %1$s, is incompatible with %2$s and needs to be disabled for %2$s to function properly. View the list of known issues for more information.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), $plugin_name, apply_filters( 'omgf_settings_page_title', 'OMGF' ), Settings::DAAN_DOCS_OMGF_PRO_KNOWN_ISSUES ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'The plugin, %1$s, requires additional configuration to be compatible with %2$s. Check the list of known issues to fix it.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), $plugin_name, apply_filters( 'omgf_settings_page_title', 'OMGF' ), Settings::DAAN_DOCS_OMGF_PRO_KNOWN_ISSUES ) )

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( '%1$s is loading an embedded iframe on your site. %2$s can\'t process Google Fonts inside iframes. Click here to find out why and what you can do about it.', 'host-webfonts-local' ), $iframe_name, apply_filters( 'omgf_settings_page_title', 'OMGF' ), 'https://daan.dev/docs/omgf-pro-faq/iframes/' ) )

wp_kses(
						"<link id='omgf-preload-$i' rel='preload' href='$url' as='font' type='font/woff2' crossorigin />\n",
						self::PRELOAD_ALLOWED_HTML
					)
